function.name: get_available_metrics
function.description: Recommended first step: Retrieve a list of all available metric keys (both physical and virtual). This helps identify which data points can be queried. ALWAYS call this first to understand the available data.

function.name: get_latest_system_data
function.description: Retrieve the most recent aggregated data point for all metrics in the system.

function.name: get_system_history
function.description: Retrieve a list of recent aggregated data points for the entire system.

limit.description: Max number of records to return (default 100).

start.description: ISO timestamp (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS) or relative time (e.g., '1h', '5m', 'today') to filter from.

end.description: ISO timestamp or relative time to filter until.

function.name: get_latest_metric_value
function.description: Retrieve the most recent value for a specific metric.

function.name: get_metric_history
function.description: Retrieve historical values for a specific metric in a compact format [timestamp, value].

start.description: Start time filter (ISO timestamp or relative like '24h', 'today').

gt.description: Value must be Greater Than this.

lt.description: Value must be Less Than this.

eq.description: Value must be Equal To this.

function.name: get_metric_stats
function.description: Retrieve aggregate statistics (avg, min, max, sum, count) for a metric over a period.

start.description: Start time filter (ISO timestamp or relative like '24h', 'today').

gt.description: Filter data Greater Than this value before calculating stats.

lt.description: Filter data Less Than this value before calculating stats.

eq.description: Filter data Equal To this value before calculating stats.

function.name: get_specific_metric_stat
function.description: Retrieve a single specific statistic for a metric.

function.name: list_virtual_metrics
function.description: List all defined virtual metrics and their calculation formulas.

function.name: create_or_update_virtual_metric
function.description: Create a new virtual metric or update an existing one using a math formula.

name.description: The name for the virtual metric.

function.name: delete_virtual_metric
function.description: Delete a virtual metric by name.

name.description: The name of the virtual metric to delete.

function.name: get_chart_data
function.description: Unified endpoint for retrieving chart data for external visualizations.

chart_type.description: 'line' for historical trends, 'gauge' for latest value.

function.name: save_dashboard_charts
function.description: Save dashboard chart configurations. Warning: Overwrites existing configuration.

function.name: get_metric_ui_configs
function.description: Retrieve metric-level UI configurations (display names, colors, etc.).

configs.description: Object mapping metric keys to configuration objects.
